versionPolicy: Registry schema version is independent from individual bunbuddy package versions. Each bunbuddy owns its own semantic version in its .bao manifest and package descriptor.

docsMetadata.title: Basler BunBuddy API
docsMetadata.description:
Industrial-grade camera control bunbuddy for Basler cameras.

## Features
- Real-time MJPEG and WebSocket streaming
- Advanced camera controls (exposure, gain, white balance, ROI)
- Multi-camera support with synchronized capture
- Hardware triggering configuration
- Image analysis (barcode, QR, OCR, quality, focus detection)

## Communication
- REST API for configuration and single captures
- MJPEG streaming for browser preview
- WebSocket for low-latency binary frames and events

mcpMetadata.description: Industrial-grade camera control bunbuddy for Basler cameras.

docsMetadata.title: Gaussian Splatting BunBuddy
docsMetadata.description: 3D Gaussian Splatting training and rendering bunbuddy with gsplat. Provides async training jobs, real-time rasterization rendering, PLY model export, PyTorch3D mesh rendering, and mesh analysis endpoints.
notes: Training requires CUDA-enabled GPU; CPU/MPS for inference only
Async training jobs with progress tracking via polling
Vectorized PLY I/O for high-performance model serialization
PyTorch3D mesh rendering and analysis integration

mcpMetadata.description: 3D Gaussian Splatting training and rendering bunbuddy with gsplat. Provides async training jobs, real-time rasterization rendering, PLY model export, PyTorch3D mesh rendering, and mesh analysis endpoints.
